// experience.log
10.2024 — Present
●
AI Engineer
@ 21Minds GmbH, Stuttgart
▸ Led AI feature ideation and engineered orchestration systems across multiple products. Built an LLM-powered assistant for event planning with a RAG pipeline integrated with MongoDB.
▸ Leveraged Azure AI Foundry and LangChain to deploy working GenAI agents, utilizing LangSmith for prompt management, versioning, and AI response evaluation loops.
▸ Built an automated live event direction system: fine-tuned RF-DETR for object detection (mAP ~48 → ~51) and implemented persistent multi-person tracking on LiveKit WebRTC streams.
03.2022 — 09.2024
●
Research Assistant
@ Fraunhofer IAO, Stuttgart
▸ Designed a multi-agent LLM decision-support prototype (LangChain + custom Python orchestration) with RAG over user-uploaded documents (FAISS) and local-first web search via SearXNG.
▸ Built a "Proactive HMI" multi-objective navigation and POI search prototype (Unity + HERE Maps): translated natural language user intents into weighted-scoring and rule-constrained ranking.
▸ Patent filed (co-inventor): "Proactive Combined Search for Navigation Point-of-Interests (POIs)" — Fraunhofer IAO.
11.2021 — 02.2022
●
Research Assistant
@ Analytic Computing, University of Stuttgart
▸ Built an XR prototype for medical education on Microsoft HoloLens (Unity/MRTK), streaming microscope feeds via WebRTC.
▸ Implemented eye-tracking features (gaze cursor, gaze logging, ROI analysis) synchronized with video.
06.2019 — 08.2019
●
Project Intern
@ Grydsense, Bengaluru
▸ Developed embedded C firmware for ZigBee lighting control.
▸ Integrated proprietary sensor board with ZigBee SoC and validated full system behavior.
// end of log
// s1mhadri.github.io — 2026
